The 4 purchase files lacked YAML frontmatter and were updated per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md and migration workflow; the 4 invoice files already contained required structured frontmatter. Inbox cleanup was completed by deleting 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after successful processing.
